The club was coached by [[Tony Rea]], competing in [[Super League VI]] and finishing in 6th place. The club also got to the fifth round of the [[2001 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]]. ==Super League VI table== {{2001 Super League regular season table|showteam=LON}} ==Challenge Cup== For the second consecutive year, the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] were knocked out of the cup at the fifth round stage.{{cite web|title=2001 Challenge Cup|url=http://www.rugby-league-world.com/2001/ChallengeCup/Cup.html|publisher=Rugby League World|access-date=27 February
